justification: All 7 ACs covered with correct test logic. AC6 boundary correctly tested as valid (not as error) with dual assertion. AC7 whitespace tested with '   '. Fee arithmetic verified numerically in AC2 (100 - 1.50 = 98.50). Boundary values exact (0, 10000, 10001). No implementation changes. acceptance_criteria_coverage complete with all 7 ACs mapped to test names. deviations section empty.

Exact boundary values used: 0 for AC4, 10001 for AC5, 10000 for AC6
